audit.heading: Audit log
audit.lede: Audit log of all write operations. Most recent entry first.

forbidden.title: Missing permission
forbidden.body: Your session does not have the Admin role. Contact the system administrator if you need access.

notFound.title: Could not load the audit log
notFound.body: Try again in a moment. Contact operations if the problem persists.

rateLimited.title: Too many requests
rateLimited.body: You have made too many requests in a short time. Try again in {seconds} seconds.

error.title: Could not load the audit log
error.body: Try again in a moment. Contact operations if the problem persists.

table.caption: Audit entries sorted by time, most recent first.

empty.title: No entries match the filter
empty.body: Adjust the filter criteria or clear them to show the whole log.

pagination.summary: Page {page} of {totalPages} · {totalCount, plural, one {# entry total} other {# entries total}}

jobb.heading: Background jobs
jobb.lede: Status of scheduled and failed background jobs. Read-only view.

forbidden.title: Missing permission
forbidden.body: Your session does not have the Admin role. Contact the system administrator if you need access.

rateLimited.title: Too many requests
rateLimited.body: You have made too many requests in a short time. Try again in {seconds} seconds.

error.title: Could not load the job status
error.body: Try again in a moment. Contact operations if the problem persists.

table.caption: Scheduled background jobs sorted by job id.

empty.title: No scheduled jobs
empty.body: No recurring background jobs are registered in Hangfire. Contact operations if you expected scheduled jobs here.

note.truncated: Showing the most recent {returned} of {totalCount} failed jobs.
note.all: {totalCount, plural, one {# failed job in total} other {# failed jobs in total}}.

table.caption: Failed background jobs sorted by time, most recent first.

empty.title: No failed jobs
empty.body: All background jobs have run without errors.
